title: HappyGhast_on_1.12.2
body:
# About this mod
![HappyGhast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Rc1X7Ede/images/03ba512d0eed91ccfaaeee686d3263a2a06d644f.png)
Adds Minecraft 1.21.6 Happy Ghast to 1.12.2.

- This mod can be added to any modpack.

**Dehydrated Ghast Blocks**:
- Can be hydrated using water bottles.
- Becomes hydrated after 3 seconds exposure to rain.
- Cannot hydrate in desert biomes.

**Happy Ghast Behavior**:
- Controls:
  - WASD: Forward/backward/left/right
  - Spacebar: Ascend
  - Ctrl: Descend
- Wandering Radius (Origin-centered wandering behavior):
  - With Harness: 16 blocks from origin point
  - Without Harness: 24 blocks from origin point
  - Baby Happy Ghasts: 12 blocks from origin point
- Origin Point Rules:
  - Initial origin at spawn point
  - Updates when dismounting
  - Updates Origin when removing Happy Ghast's lead

**Ghastling**:
- Snowball: Reduces growth cycle by 10%
- Fire Charge: Freezes current growth stage
- Reactivation: Snowball restarts frozen growth

**Leashing entities**: 
- Sneak + Right-click to transfer all leashed targets to Happy Ghast

**Multiplayer Notice**:
- Recommended to avoid logging out while standing on Happy Ghast
- When a Happy Ghast is waiting for a disconnected player:
  - If another player rides it, the original reservation will be cleared
  - Reconnection may still risk fall damage

# Bugs or Suggestions
- **Always update to latest version before reporting**
- Contact:
  - [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/sui-ke/Minecraft-Mod-suikehappyghast/issues)
  - email: mu_xun@outlook.com (Subject: Bugs/Suggestions for HappyGhast_on_1.12.2)

Known Issues:
- When auto-moving: May not face forward properly (cause unknown).
